evals.name: rank-since-date-with-exclusion
evals.prompt: fan out some agents and go through everything I've built on this machine since May 1, then rank them from the most original / genius ideas down to the least important. skip anything farmgpu related.
evals.expected_output: A tiered ranking (strongest idea first) of the user's non-farmgpu projects/ideas on the machine, built from a parallel two-pass discovery sweep. Should respect the May-1 cutoff and the farmgpu exclusion, cover blind spots (transcripts, running services, research artifacts), tag idea-vs-live-vs-dormant, and be read-only.

evals.name: implicit-inventory-worth-my-time
evals.prompt: I've got a ton of half-finished side projects scattered around this laptop and honestly I've lost track. can you take stock of what's actually here and tell me which ones are actually worth my time?
evals.expected_output: Triggers the skill from indirect phrasing (no 'agents'/'rank'/'genius' keywords). Discovers the user's projects across the machine via the two-pass sweep, then ranks/prioritizes by what's worth pursuing. Should still hit blind spots and stay read-only.
